findings.description: s2 maps to a large RST h2 section (コード値の表示方法) containing 4 distinct h3 subsections: codeSelectタグ、codeRadioButtonsタグ、codeCheckboxesタグ、codeCheckboxタグ. The combined content of s2 far exceeds 2000 characters and has clear sub-structure that warrants splitting into separate knowledge sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST h3 headings: codeSelectタグ (==============), codeRadioButtonsタグ (====================), codeCheckboxesタグ (==================), codeCheckboxタグ (==================) — all under the h2 コード値の表示方法 (------------------)

findings.description: The attribute `value` (first column of codeCheckboxタグ attribute table) is missing from s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: codeCheckboxタグ attribute table first column: value, codeId, optionColumnName, labelPattern, offCodeValue — only codeId, optionColumnName, labelPattern, offCodeValue appear in hints; `value` is absent.
